# minio_s3_bucket_quota (Data Source)

Reads the quota configuration of an existing S3 bucket.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "minio_s3_bucket_quota" "example" {
  bucket = "my-bucket"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `bucket` (String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `quota` (Number)
- `type` (String)
